description:
You are the Lab Manager for a sensitive research project. Update the access permissions for the 'Zebrafish Gene Editing' project to reflect recent personnel changes by removing 'Jane Doe' from the project, changing 'John Smith' to the 'Guest' role, and adding 'Sarah Connor' with the 'User' role. All users are already members of the SciNote Team.

Login Credentials:
- E-mail: admin@scinote.net
- Password: inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming
